requirement_topic.en: ARENE Licensing and EDM Grid Connection — IEC 62116, IEC 61727, and 220/380 V 50 Hz Settings
requirement_topic.zh: ARENE许可和EDM并网——IEC 62116、IEC 61727及220/380 V 50 Hz参数
requirement_topic.zht: ARENE許可和EDM併網——IEC 62116、IEC 61727及220/380 V 50 Hz參數

summary.en: Grid-tied PV inverter deployment in Mozambique should be treated as a regulated electricity activity requiring confirmation of ARENE licensing obligations and EDM connection requirements. Mozambique's public grid is commonly specified as 220/380 V, 50 Hz. Inverter protection settings, anti-islanding behavior, reconnection delay, voltage/frequency trip points, and utility-interface performance must be reviewed against EDM's project connection conditions and the applicable IEC evidence package, especially IEC 62116 and IEC 61727. Large hydro from Cahora Bassa coexists with low electrification and growing donor, IPP, off-grid, mini-grid, mining, and Cabo Delgado gas-sector demand, so project-specific connection and lender requirements can be decisive.
summary.zh: 在莫桑比克部署并网光伏逆变器应视为受监管电力活动，需要确认ARENE许可义务和EDM接入要求。莫桑比克公共电网通常为220/380 V、50 Hz。逆变器保护整定、防孤岛行为、重连延迟、电压/频率脱扣点和公用电网接口性能，须依据EDM项目接入条件及适用IEC证据包进行审查，尤其是IEC 62116和IEC 61727。莫桑比克虽有Cahora Bassa大型水电，但电气化率较低，捐助方、IPP、离网、微电网、矿业和Cabo Delgado天然气领域需求增长，因此项目特定接入和贷款方要求可能具有决定性。
summary.zht: 在莫三比克部署併網光伏逆變器應視為受監管電力活動，需要確認ARENE許可義務和EDM接入要求。莫三比克公共電網通常為220/380 V、50 Hz。逆變器保護整定、防孤島行為、重連延遲、電壓/頻率脫扣點和公用電網介面性能，須依據EDM項目接入條件及適用IEC證據包進行審查，尤其是IEC 62116和IEC 61727。莫三比克雖有Cahora Bassa大型水電，但電氣化率較低，捐助方、IPP、離網、微電網、礦業和Cabo Delgado天然氣領域需求增長，因此項目特定接入和貸款方要求可能具有決定性。

standards_or_laws: ARENE electricity-sector licensing and regulatory requirements for Mozambique
EDM project-specific grid-connection requirements for Mozambique's 220/380 V, 50 Hz network
IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for PV power stations, NB/T 32004 for grid-connected PV inverters, GB/T 37408-2021 technical evidence, and domestic anti-islanding or protection-setting reports. These are calibrated to Chinese grid operator requirements and China domestic project approvals. They do not create ARENE licensing clearance or EDM connection acceptance in Mozambique.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括适用于光伏电站的GB/T 19964-2024、适用于并网光伏逆变器的NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408-2021技术证据，以及国内防孤岛或保护整定报告。这些文件依据中国电网运营商要求和中国国内项目审批编制，不构成莫桑比克ARENE许可放行或EDM接入接受。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括適用於光伏電站的GB/T 19964-2024、適用於併網光伏逆變器的NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408-2021技術證據，以及國內防孤島或保護整定報告。這些文件依據中國電網運營商要求和中國國內項目審批編制，不構成莫三比克ARENE許可放行或EDM接入接受。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese grid certificates and factory firmware settings do not transfer to Mozambique. Exporters should confirm whether the project requires ARENE licensing or registration, obtain EDM project connection requirements, validate firmware against Mozambique's 220/380 V, 50 Hz grid, and provide IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence for the specific inverter model. Where the project is donor- or lender-financed, the lender's technical annex may impose IEC evidence beyond the minimum local connection package.
gap.zh: 差距：中国并网证书和出厂固件设置不能转移适用于莫桑比克。出口商应确认项目是否需要ARENE许可或登记，取得EDM项目接入要求，按莫桑比克220/380 V、50 Hz电网验证固件，并提供特定逆变器型号的IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727公用电网接口证据。若项目由捐助方或贷款方融资，贷款方技术附件可能在本地最低接入包之外要求IEC证据。
gap.zht: 差距：中國併網證書和出廠韌體設置不能轉移適用於莫三比克。出口商應確認項目是否需要ARENE許可或登記，取得EDM項目接入要求，按莫三比克220/380 V、50 Hz電網驗證韌體，並提供特定逆變器型號的IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727公用電網介面證據。若項目由捐助方或貸款方融資，貸款方技術附件可能在本地最低接入包之外要求IEC證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where ARENE licensing, EDM connection approval, or project-owner/lender grid-connection specifications apply; exact obligations depend on project size, connection type, and regulatory classification
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection approvals satisfy Chinese domestic requirements only and are not transferable to ARENE or EDM without Mozambique project acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on China GB/T 19964-2024, NB/T 32004, or factory default grid settings as Mozambique grid-connection evidence. Confirm ARENE licensing, obtain EDM connection conditions, and validate IEC 62116 / IEC 61727 evidence and firmware settings for the 220/380 V, 50 Hz network before project submission.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应依赖中国GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004或出厂默认电网设置作为莫桑比克并网证据。请在项目提交前确认ARENE许可、取得EDM接入条件，并针对220/380 V、50 Hz电网验证IEC 62116 / IEC 61727证据和固件设置。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應依賴中國GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004或出廠預設電網設置作為莫三比克併網證據。請在項目提交前確認ARENE許可、取得EDM接入條件，並針對220/380 V、50 Hz電網驗證IEC 62116 / IEC 61727證據和韌體設置。

requirement_topic.en: EDM Project Connection and Rural / Mini-Grid Programmes — Documentation Gate for Financed Solar
requirement_topic.zh: EDM项目接入和农村/微电网计划——融资太阳能的文件门槛
requirement_topic.zht: EDM項目接入和農村/微電網計畫——融資太陽能的文件門檻

summary.en: Mozambique solar projects are not limited to ordinary product import. Utility-scale plants such as Mocuba and Metoro, rural electrification programmes, off-grid and mini-grid schemes, and C&I systems for mining or LNG-linked demand often require EDM technical review, owner engineer approval, and donor or development-finance documentation. These packages commonly ask for IEC-referenced inverter datasheets, protection-setting tables, commissioning procedures, grid-code declarations, and test certificates rather than China-only certification summaries.
summary.zh: 莫桑比克太阳能项目并不限于普通产品进口。Mocuba、Metoro等公用事业规模电站、农村电气化计划、离网和微电网方案，以及服务矿业或LNG相关需求的工商业系统，通常要求EDM技术审查、业主工程师批准及捐助方或发展金融文件。这些文件包通常要求引用IEC的逆变器数据表、保护整定表、调试程序、电网规范声明和测试证书，而非仅限中国认证摘要。
summary.zht: 莫三比克太陽能項目並不限於普通產品進口。Mocuba、Metoro等公用事業規模電站、農村電氣化計畫、離網和微電網方案，以及服務礦業或LNG相關需求的工商業系統，通常要求EDM技術審查、業主工程師批准及捐助方或發展金融文件。這些文件包通常要求引用IEC的逆變器數據表、保護整定表、調試程序、電網規範聲明和測試證書，而非僅限中國認證摘要。

standards_or_laws: EDM project connection and commissioning requirements
IEC 62116 — anti-islanding evidence for utility-interconnected PV inverters
IEC 61727 — utility-interface evidence for photovoltaic systems
Lender, donor, and owner-engineer specifications for Mozambique PV projects

summary.en: China domestic distributed or utility PV approvals are based on Chinese grid-company rules and domestic standards such as GB/T 19964-2024, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 37408-2021. Those approvals may show product maturity but do not satisfy EDM project review, Mozambique rural electrification programme requirements, or lender technical annexes unless explicitly accepted.
summary.zh: 中国国内分布式或公用事业光伏审批依据中国电网公司规则及GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004和GB/T 37408-2021等国内标准。这些审批可显示产品成熟度，但除非被明确接受，否则不能满足EDM项目审查、莫桑比克农村电气化计划要求或贷款方技术附件。
summary.zht: 中國國內分散式或公用事業光伏審批依據中國電網公司規則及GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004和GB/T 37408-2021等國內標準。這些審批可顯示產品成熟度，但除非被明確接受，否則不能滿足EDM項目審查、莫三比克農村電氣化計畫要求或貸款方技術附件。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Mozambique project documentation often needs model-specific IEC certificates, commissioning records, firmware settings, and site-specific protection coordination in addition to import paperwork. Exporters should align with the EPC, EDM, the owner engineer, and the lender before shipment so the inverter certificate package matches the actual project scale and connection arrangement.
gap.zh: 差距：莫桑比克项目文件通常除进口文件外，还需要特定型号IEC证书、调试记录、固件设置和特定现场保护配合。出口商应在出货前与EPC、EDM、业主工程师和贷款方对齐，使逆变器证书包匹配实际项目规模和接入安排。
gap.zht: 差距：莫三比克項目文件通常除進口文件外，還需要特定型號IEC證書、調試記錄、韌體設置和特定現場保護配合。出口商應在出貨前與EPC、EDM、業主工程師和貸款方對齊，使逆變器證書包匹配實際項目規模和接入安排。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for EDM-connected, donor-financed, IPP, rural electrification, mini-grid, C&I, mining, and LNG-linked projects where the owner engineer or lender requires IEC evidence
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese project approvals and product certificates are background evidence only unless the Mozambique project owner, EDM, and lender accept them

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Mozambique solar projects, EDM connection and lender documentation can be as important as import conformity. Build the inverter dossier around project-specific IEC certificates, protection settings, and commissioning evidence rather than China-only approvals, and confirm acceptance with EDM, the EPC, and the owner engineer before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对莫桑比克太阳能项目而言，EDM接入和贷款方文件可能与进口合格评定同样重要。逆变器资料包应围绕项目特定IEC证书、保护设置和调试证据建立，而非仅依赖中国审批，并应在出货前与EDM、EPC和业主工程师确认接受。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對莫三比克太陽能項目而言，EDM接入和貸款方文件可能與進口合格評定同樣重要。逆變器資料包應圍繞項目特定IEC證書、保護設置和調試證據建立，而非僅依賴中國審批，並應在出貨前與EDM、EPC和業主工程師確認接受。
